summary: All requested Auto Vehicles modal refinements and 2/3 Wheelers feature tested successfully. Production/Sales selector is on same row as time range. Category toggles allow deselect (become dull at 0.42 opacity) while keeping visual format. Auto Vehicles stacked chart excludes 2/3 wheelers (only 5 categories: Cars, Trucks, Buses, Jeeps & Pickups, Tractors). Real Sector panel includes new 2/3 Wheelers tile with Production (157.5K) and Sales (159.5K) values. 2/3 Wheelers modal opens with Production/Sales mode toggle, time range selector, and area trend chart. LSM and Auto cards still work correctly.
passed_tests: Auto Vehicles modal has Production/Sales selector on same row as time range
Auto Vehicles category toggles allow deselect (opacity changes from 1 to 0.42)
Category toggles restore opacity when reselected
At least one category must remain selected (last cannot be deselected)
Auto Vehicles stacked chart excludes 2/3 wheelers (only 5 categories shown)
Chart updates correctly when series are toggled on/off
Real Sector panel shows 2/3 Wheelers tile
2/3 Wheelers tile shows MoM change percentages
2/3 Wheelers tile is clickable and opens modal
2/3 Wheelers modal has Production/Sales mode toggle on same row as time selector
2/3 Wheelers modal has 1Y, 2Y, 5Y, ALL time range options
2/3 Wheelers modal shows area trend chart
2/3 Wheelers modal Sales mode toggle works
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto Vehicles modal refinements complete: Production/Sales on same row as time range, category toggles support deselect with visual dimming, 2/3 wheelers excluded from stacked chart. New 2/3 Wheelers tile added to Real Sector panel with its own modal featuring area trend chart. LSM and Auto cards continue to work as expected.
